mapper.insert: insert into certificate (title, startDate, deadline, trainUnit, trainsInfoId) values (#{title}, #{startDate}, #{deadline}, #{trainUnit}, #{trainsInfoId})
mapper.update:
update certificate
title = #{title},
startDate = #{startDate},
deadline = #{deadline},
trainUnit = #{trainUnit},
trainsInfoId = #{trainsInfoId},
where trainsInfoId = #{trainsInfoId}
